text.title: llamaindex-chat-engine Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 high-impact failure modes for llamaindex-chat-engine with detectors and fixes that map back to rules in 01-core-rules.xml.

antipattern.root-cause: Token limit too low; old context dropped before the user circled back.
antipattern.fix: Set token_limit to ~3900 for 8k models, ~7500 for 16k.
antipattern.detector: Run a 20-turn synthetic dialog; check coherence.

antipattern.symptom: Bot uses react mode and burns 3 LLM calls per turn
antipattern.root-cause: react mode picked for plain Q&A.
antipattern.fix: Use condense_plus_context unless tool calls are needed.
antipattern.detector: Count LLM calls per turn; should be 1-2 for Q&A.

antipattern.symptom: Streaming UX shows a half-typed answer then jumps
antipattern.root-cause: Streaming was enabled but the postprocessor reformats at the end.
antipattern.fix: Either stream-and-no-postprocess, or no-stream-and-postprocess; never both.
antipattern.detector: Eyeball the UI; if it jumps, you've got both.

antipattern.root-cause: Same ChatMemoryBuffer instance reused across users.
antipattern.fix: Instantiate per-session; key by session_id; same as [[langchain-memory]] rules.
antipattern.detector: Run two parallel sessions with sentinel facts; verify isolation.
